title: Extended Highlights | Man City 2-1 Newcastle | Huge win at home for the Blues!

comments.author: @davidwaterhouse2552
comments.text: Should have mentioned the former 'LEGENDS' of the club welcoming the first team onto the field of play! This club was formed in 1894, and whilst those 'Forefathers ' are long gone but NEVER Forgotten, let us respect the 'Former legends' who are still around, gave everything for the club, and are still giving their time and support!  I quickly spotted; Tommy Booth, Asa Hartford, Willie Donachie , Peter Barnes members of the 1976 League cup winning side who beat Newcastle! dx
